rationale: Substantial product PR for ReZilient/AFK Unbound: adds 7 new base44 entity jsonc schema files (AIRecommendations, AudioLibrary, Notifications, RiskScores, Roadmaps, VeteransResources, etc.), redesigns EmergencyCalmMode with new support actions (988 crisis line, mentor text, grounding), splits PilotShell tabs into client vs counselor variants, and adds ClientHomeView with new role-based copy. The error-swallow detector fired on a try/catch pattern somewhere in this PR, but the diff is dominated by feature additions and UI redesign with coherent imports and rendering — no obvious cheat indicators. The detector finding is a likely false positive on a legitimate empty-catch idiom (e.g., idempotent DDL migration) rather than a real error-swallow.
